# Return Window

Items may be returned within 30 days of delivery for a full refund, provided
the item is unused and in its original packaging. Refunds are issued to the
original payment method within 5-7 business days of the returned item being
received and inspected at the warehouse.

[Source: refund_policy.md#return-window]
